status.description: Represents the status of an asynchronous execution, which can be in progress, succeeded, or failed.
status.title: Aruba.CmpService.BaremetalProvider.Abstractions.Models.AsyncExecStatus

schema.description:
DTO for returning the status of an asynchronous execution, along with an optional resource URI 
that can be used to check the status or retrieve results.
